title: WordPress REST API — Search, Themes & Settings

actors.name: API Consumer (Anonymous)
actors.description: Any unauthenticated HTTP client; can perform search queries

actors.name: API Consumer (Authenticated / Editor)
actors.description: Logged-in user with edit_posts capability; can read active theme details

actors.name: API Consumer (Admin)
actors.description: User with manage_options capability; can read/write site settings. User with switch_themes/manage_network_themes capability can list all themes

actors.name: WordPress Core
actors.description: Internal system actor: WP_Query, get_option, update_option, wp_get_themes, register_setting

use_cases.name: Search Site Content
steps: Client sends GET /wp/v2/search?search=keyword&type=post
WP_REST_Search_Controller::get_items() resolves handler via get_search_handler($request)
Delegates to WP_REST_Search_Handler::search_items($request) → returns RESULT_IDS + RESULT_TOTAL
Each ID passed to prepare_item_for_response() → handler::prepare_item() + prepare_item_links()
Returns paginated collection with X-WP-Total / X-WP-TotalPages headers and prev/next Link headers

use_cases.name: Search Posts (Post Search Handler)
use_cases.description: Handler type='post'; subtypes = all public REST-enabled post types except attachment. Uses WP_Query internally.

use_cases.name: Search Terms (Term Search Handler)
use_cases.description: Handler type='term'; subtypes = all public REST-enabled taxonomies.

use_cases.name: Search Post Formats
use_cases.description: Handler type='post-format'; returns registered post format slugs.

use_cases.name: List Themes (All)
steps: Client sends GET /wp/v2/themes
get_items_permissions_check(): must have switch_themes or manage_network_themes
Exception: status=['active'] only requires edit_posts or post-type edit cap (check_read_active_theme_permission)
get_items() calls wp_get_themes() + wp_get_theme() to determine active theme
Each theme prepared via prepare_item_for_response() with is_same_theme() for status field
Returns collection with X-WP-Total / X-WP-TotalPages=1

use_cases.name: List Active Theme Only
use_cases.permission: edit_posts or any public REST post type edit capability
use_cases.description: Lower-privilege path: only active theme returned; read-only metadata exposed.

use_cases.name: Get Single Theme
use_cases.actor: API Consumer (Admin or Editor for active theme)
steps: get_item_permissions_check(): switch_themes OR (is active theme AND edit_posts)
wp_get_theme(stylesheet) → theme exists check (404 if not)
prepare_item_for_response() returns full theme object
Response includes _links: self, collection, user-global-styles (wp/v2/global-styles/{id})

use_cases.name: Read Site Settings
steps: get_item_permissions_check(): current_user_can('manage_options')
get_item() → get_registered_options() filters get_registered_settings() to show_in_rest=true entries
For each option: apply_filters('rest_pre_get_setting') then get_option() as fallback
Values cast via prepare_value() using rest_validate_value_from_schema + rest_sanitize_value_from_schema
Returns flat key-value object of all registered REST-exposed options

use_cases.name: Update Site Settings
steps: Same permission check as read (manage_options)
update_item() → get_registered_options() to validate writable keys
apply_filters('rest_pre_update_setting') allows hijacking per-option
null value → delete_option(); non-null → update_option()
Returns updated settings via get_item() — same read response
use_cases.guard: Null value rejected if stored value already invalid (prevents mass-null wiping)

key_classes.subtypes: all public show_in_rest post types except attachment

permissions_summary: Themes list all (GET /themes): switch_themes OR manage_network_themes
Themes list active only (GET /themes?status[]=active): edit_posts or REST post type edit cap
Single theme (GET /themes/{stylesheet}): switch_themes OR (active theme AND edit_posts)
relationships: WP_REST_Settings_Controller depends_on WordPress Options API (get_option, update_option, get_registered_settings)
important_notes: All three controllers register under namespace 'wp/v2' (introduced WP 4.7+)
Search added in WP 5.0; term search handler added in WP 5.6; post-format handler in 5.6
Themes controller added in WP 5.0; single-theme endpoint added in 5.7
Search supports pagination via page/per_page; themes always returns TotalPages=1
Theme theme_supports field only populated for the currently active theme
Settings null-value protection prevents accidental deletion of all invalid-value options
rest_prepare_theme filter allows plugins to customize theme response
rest_pre_get_setting / rest_pre_update_setting filters allow hijacking individual options
